item.title: Former Game of Thrones star Hannah Murray recalls being drawn into a wellness cult
item.description: ‘I made terrible choices.’

item.title: China sending astronaut on year-long space mission
item.description: The race to return a human to the moon is heating up as pressure mounts on China to meet its 2030 deadline.

item.title: Oscar Piastri fumes over team radio after risky strategy backfires as Kimi Antonelli wins Canadian Grand Prix
item.description: ‘Major, major disappointment and there will be a very big debrief at McLaren after this.’

item.title: Dezi Freeman: Coronial inquests into deaths of fugitive and two slain Victorian police officers to begin
item.description: Speculation has been rife over how Freeman eluded capture for seven months.

item.title: Formula One legend Alain Prost becomes victim of violent home attack
item.description: The 71-year-old has suffered a head injury after coming face to face with intruders in his home.

item.title: Peter V’landys becomes interim NRL chief executive after Andrew Abdo quits to join Tennis Australia
item.description: Rugby league’s supremo has made an immediate move amid the ‘devastation’ of his right-hand man’s departure.

item.title: Devil Wears Prada star Anne Hathaway reveals her trick for a non-surgical ‘facelift’
item.description: ‘I wanted to show that I didn’t make a huge medical decision.’

item.title: US comedian Laura Clery reveals ‘terrifying’ accident after being pinned under 270kg fridge
item.description: ‘I could feel it getting harder to inhale, like my body was deciding to shut down.’

item.title: Australian hero Neale Daniher dies aged 65 after brave 13-year battle with MND
item.description: The AFL icon’s inspiring life is sadly over, but he never gave up the fight.

item.title: Anna Robards talks about daughter Elle’s hair-pulling habit: ‘Traumatising’
item.description: ‘I was seriously lost.’

item.title: Do It For Dolly Day inches toward $2 million goal as fight continues to end bullying
item.description: ‘The love Australians have shown for Dolly and for our cause never ceases to move us.’

item.title: Rough sleepers, ex‑prisoners living in Adelaide park Edinburgh Reserve ordered to leave
item.description: Council has now issued the group of men living in the Adelaide park an ultimatum.

item.title: AFL bombshell as Collingwood potentially robbed of win over Hawthorn due to interchange blunder
item.description: ‘They should protest, because it’s so obvious. The evidence is there that the result should be their win.’

item.title: Neale Daniher’s closest mates Bill Guest and Chris Fagan share agonising last conversations
item.description: The icon still had his humour but ‘I knew when we left we’d never see Neale again - it was very sad’.

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026: Lionel Messi joins list of injury concerns ahead of kick-off in US, Canada and Mexico
item.description: The tournament begins in just three weeks.

item.title: Russia warns foreigners to evacuate Kyiv as it threatens onslaught on Ukraine’s capital
item.description: Moscow claims the strikes are in response to an attack on a student dorm in Russian-controlled Luhansk.

item.title: Donald Trump hinges Iran peace deal on Arab nations recognising Israel
item.description: The US president has warned of fresh attacks if current peace talks fail.

item.title: Vital Socceroos star Riley McGree ruled out with hamstring injury in major World Cup blow
item.description: Australia will be without one of their most creative and influential players for the tournament.

item.title: Dozens of drones plunge from the sky during Vivid Sydney light show
item.description: Multiple shows have been cancelled following the malfunction.

item.title: Rescuers race against time to reach seven people trapped in flooded Laos cave
item.description: Seven people who ventured into a cave to look for gold have been trapped for a week after flash flooding blocked their exit.

item.title: US unleashes barrage of new ‘self-defence strikes’ on Iran during tense peace talks
item.description: Tensions are intensifying between the two countries as both sides contest details in proposed peace agreements.

item.title: 2026 American Music Awards: The best looks from the red carpet before BTS opened the 52nd ceremony
item.description: The stars have descended on Las Vegas as the annual ceremony kicks off at the iconic MGM Grand.

item.title: Travis Head and wife Jess subjected to social media abuse after Virat Kohli handshake snub
item.description: The Aussie superstar has been bombarded with tens of thousands of abusive comments online.

item.title: Sam Armytage farewells her 100-year-old grandma Dorothy with emotional post
item.description: ‘She was 100 and pure magic.’

item.title: Millions of Australian households to save hundreds on power bills from July
item.description: Some households could save up to $229 a year.

item.title: Calls for early-onset bowel cancer to be considered ‘new disease’ as cases surge among young Aussies
item.description: Doctors are sounding the alarm as the disease is ‘driven by factors that we don’t yet understand.’

item.title: Alleged serial tip jar thief caught on CCTV targeting cafes and charity collections across southeast Queensland
item.description: ‘Five seconds and she’s gone.’

item.title: ‘Dangerous’ baby bottle self-feeding devices permanently banned in Australia
item.description: ‘We urge consumers to stop using these devices immediately.’

item.title: Western Australia spruiks plan for defence manufacturing hub in Collie
item.description: A state government could transform a coal-mining town into a hub for building military equipment.

item.title: Brisbane City Council slugs drivers more than $45 million in parking fines in less than a year
item.description: The numbers reveal which parking offences are costing motorists the most.

item.title: Iran labels new US strikes as ‘gross violation’ of ceasefire
item.description: ‘The clock cannot be turned back, and the nations and lands of the region will no longer be a shield for American bases.’

item.title: Politicians clash as changes to capital gains tax split public opinion
item.description: ‘In politics, you don’t do the popular thing, you do the right thing.’

item.title: Major change coming to JobSeeker after years of ‘inefficiencies’
item.description: The reforms mark the system’s first overhaul in three decades.

item.title: Anne Hathaway reveals secret health battle: 'Half blind'
item.description: ‘I didn’t realise how bad it had gotten.’

item.title: Humble farmer’s shocking response to winning $12 million lottery prize
item.description: ‘Now is not a good time.’

item.title: Renewed call for Indigenous Voice to Parliament during Reconciliation Week
item.description: One thing has become increasingly clear since the referendum in 2023, say Uluru Dialogue co-chairs.

item.title: Queensland teenager suffers life-threatening internal injuries in horse accident
item.description: ‘The pain was spreading everywhere. It was like I had been winded but like a hundred times worse.’

item.title: Customers caught up in ticketing reshuffle as Come Alive! The Greatest Showman Circus Spectacular comes to Australia
item.description: Attendees claim seats to the popular live show were moved back and some families were separated across venues.

item.title: Five of seven people trapped in Laos cave found alive, rescuers say
item.description: The lost villagers have been trapped for a week after heavy flooding blocked the exit.

item.title: Heartwarming moment rescue team celebrates after survivors discovered in Laos cave
item.description: The five villagers were trapped in a flooded cave for eight days before a Thai rescue crew located them.

item.title: Erin Patterson locks in date to appeal convictions for death cap mushroom murders
item.description: The 51-year-old has outlined the grounds of her appeal.

item.title: Pat Cummins and Travis Head miss out on IPL final after Vaibhav Sooryavanshi powers Rajasthan Royals to victory
item.description: The freakish teenager has once again left the cricket world speechless.

item.title: Tax changes defended by Labor higher-ups despite criticism from state leaders
item.description: Two state premiers have now broken ranks and urged the government to change course.

item.title: Eleven feared dead in US chemical tank rupture as search moves from rescue to recovery
item.description: ‘We’re bracing ourselves for this being the deadliest industrial tragedy in modern Washington state history.’

item.title: EzyMart stores accused of selling illegal vapes shut down across Sydney CBD by NSW Health
item.description: More than a dozen stores have been closed in just one council area.

item.title: Home and Away: Who will get shot?
item.description: Will one beloved Summer Bay resident take their last breath?

item.title: Bullsbrook quarantine extended for Australian passengers from hantavirus-hit cruise ship
item.description: Australia’s Health Minister has revealed why the isolation period will be pushed out by weeks.

item.title: ‘Donald Trump’ buffalo spared from Eid sacrifice after going viral in Bangladesh
item.description: The albino buffalo’s flowing blond hair and fringe drew comparisons to the US president.

item.title: Woman fronts court after alleged tip jar and charity box theft spree in Queensland
item.description: ‘It’s just so many of them,’ a magistrate said while refusing the woman bail.

item.title: Supercars referee Craig Baird cops whack for publicly shaming ‘grub’ driver Ryan Wood
item.description: The respected official has been forced to issue a public statement after crossing a line.

item.title: Pelican Waters man charged after teen cyclist left with ‘life-changing’ injuries in alleged hit-run
item.description: The 13-year-old boy has endured marathon surgeries lasting up to 15 hours.

item.title: Australian Josh Richards flying to Laos to rescue survivors trapped in flooded cave
item.description: The experienced diver concedes he is ‘scared’ as rescue teams battle dangerous conditions.

item.title: Australian ‘looksmaxxer’ influencer Androgenic removed from Jetstar flight after cosmetic surgery in Thailand
item.description: ‘You’re swelling right now, your eyes ... Your face is very ill.’

item.title: Iran and US trade new strikes as Trump dismisses pressure to end war
item.description: Both sides are accusing the other of violating their shaky ceasefire and further imperiling diplomatic efforts to end the war.

item.title: Middle East war: Peace deal between Iran and US hinges on Donald Trump’s signature
item.description: The cost of oil is predicted ‘come down very quickly’ once a deal is finalised.

item.title: John Farnham speaks about the future of his singing career: ‘Not possible’
item.description: The Australian music legend stepped back from the stage following his 2022 oral cancer diagnosis.

item.title: Singer Susan Boyle teases new single Just One and debuts bold new look
item.description: The Scottish musician rose to fame when her 2009 audition for Britain’s Got Talent went viral.

item.title: Blue Origin rocket explodes into massive fireball during latest engine test
item.description: The rocket was being prepared to launch satellites for Amazon’s internet network.

item.title: Little-known A-League player Tim Payne an instant social media millionaire ahead of World Cup
item.description: The veteran has enjoyed ‘a pretty crazy 48 hours’ as he prepares to jet off to the World Cup.

item.title: F1 obsessed scientists name ancient wasp species after Oscar Piastri
item.description: The biologists just couldn’t help themselves after they found the preserved, ancient species.

item.title: Benjamin Netanyahu tasks Israeli army with taking 70 per cent of Gaza Strip
item.description: ‘Let’s start with that.’

item.title: Frustrated parents accuse Roblox of normalising gambling for young children
item.description: ‘I don’t think personally they should even be allowed to spend there. At their age they don’t know what is good or bad.’

item.title: Jai Arrow and fiancee Berina open up on his MND outlook and their future as a family
item.description: The couple choked back tears as they spoke openly on the ‘big discussions’ around wanting more kids and fighting on.

item.title: US comedian Rosie O’Donnell details plastic surgery journey and confirms facelift
item.description: ‘There’s a point where acceptance starts to feel like lying.’

item.title: Prince Haakon of Norway shares update on his wife Princess Mett-Marit’s chronic lung condition
item.description: The princess confirmed she was diagnosed with the incurable disease in 2018.

item.title: Officeworks moves Australian jobs to India and Philippines as part of ‘significant’ transformation
item.description: The company claims the move will help keep prices low for customers.

item.title: EOFY NBN and internet plans you can’t afford to miss
item.description: EOFY deals on NBN are heating up with major providers offering big discounts.

item.title: Man, 67, arrested after allegedly driving at police and crashing into Mudgee Police Station
item.description: Dramatic footage shows police tape surrounding the damaged station as officers gather outside.

item.title: Perth and state’s south brace for wild WA Day long weekend storm system that comes once every five years
item.description: ‘It’s likely to be the strongest winter system we see this year.’

item.title: X creator push exposes pay gap facing Australian creators and publishers
item.description: The new X Creator Connect raises questions about Australian creator income, TikTok monetisation and payments.

item.title: Former prime minister Tony Abbott named federal Liberal Party president
item.description: ‘I regard it as my duty to serve the party in this time of existential crisis.’

item.title: 2027 Kia Seltos Hybrid likely to start under $40k drive-away in Australia
item.description: Kia has slipped some new local details for the new Seltos Hybrid, including its projected base price and lineup structure ahead of an October launch.

item.description: Tennis might have Andrew Abdo’s better half to thank for securing their man.

item.description: A brand-new crop of farmers are ready to follow their hearts with the show set to premiere on June 8.

item.title: Detectives make sobering admission about missing Gus Lamont as police probe sightings across Australia and the globe
item.description: Police have received hundreds of reported sightings of the four-year-old from Bali to Syria.

item.title: French Open player Adolfo Daniel Vallejo courts controversy with sexist complaint
item.description: ‘This sort of match needs to be umpired by a man.’

item.description: The mother and her two boys were buried together in one grave during an emotional service.

item.description: Lachy Dovaston and a group of others are being questioned by authorities.

item.description: The league fixed a problem but all it’s done is create another one even worse.

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS
item.description: The latest in Spotlight

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: MND cases rising in Australia as researchers hunt for breakthrough treatments
item.description: The death of AFL great Neale Daniher from motor neurone disease and NRL player Jai Arrow's diagnosis have thrust the cruel condition back into the spotlight.

item.title: Shane van Gisbergen’s first V8 Supercars-winning Ford Falcon up for auction
item.description: The car Shane van Gisbergen drove to his first V8 Supercars career win is up for sale for the first time in more than a decade.

item.title: Short-stay accommodation in Sydney City Council firing line as critics lay blame for rental shortage
item.description: ‘They’re a blight on our society and they’ve absolutely exacerbated the housing crisis.’

item.title: Helicopter pilot breaks long silence on F1 legend Michael Schumacher’s mountain rescue
item.description: ‘When the commander ordered us to remove our microphones ... I understood that it was true.’

item.title: Tennis legend Novak Djokovic’s French Open dream up in smoke after losing thriller to Joao Fonseca
item.description: There’s one thing the tennis legend simply could not face after his sensational French Open exit.

item.title: Bus driver to face charges after deadly crash involving vehicles slowed for work zone on US highway
item.description: A car burst into flames and dozens of passengers were rushed to hospital after the bus slammed into vehicles slowing for roadworks.

item.title: Geely V8 to power Lotus Esprit, new off-roading SUV
item.description: A new V8 being developed by Geely and Renault will find its way into the new Lotus mid-engine supercar, as well as other vehicles in Geely empire.

item.title: Mitsubishi Triton Raider could preview return of Ralliart brand
item.description: Mitsubishi still wants to reinstate its Ralliart performance brand, and the newly launched Triton Raider could be a sneak peek at what's to come.

item.title: The golden era of the Chinese automotive industry is over, says automaker CEO
item.description: Slower new-car sales in China have continued into May, with the boss of one Chinese brand saying the record growth of previous years will never be seen again.

item.title: Perth courier charged over alleged delivery van rape of teen girl he met on the job
item.description: The 39-year-old allegedly told the teenager he could drive her when needed.

item.title: Alex de Minaur shattered after ‘gut-wrenching’ French Open defeat
item.description: The Aussie has taken a long, hard look at himself and doesn’t ‘understand what’s changed’.

item.title: Blayke Brailey’s suspected broken arm sours Cronulla Sharks’ spirited win over Sea Eagles
item.description: ‘He’s dejected, obviously ... hopefully it’s clean and not displaced.’

item.title: Three climbers killed after fall near Denali Pass on Alaska’s Mount McKinley
item.description: A fourth mountaineer was dramatically rescued by helicopter after the group plunged along one of the peak’s most dangerous routes.

item.title: Interim Carlton coach Josh Fraser all class after epic win over Geelong
item.description: The fill-in coach is impressing the entire AFL world as he enjoys his time in the spotlight.

item.title: Family of slain cops slam sale of Wieambilla ‘house of horrors’
item.description: Relatives say the sale ‘is an absolute insult to the memories’ of the two young constables and neighbour killed in the ambush a the remote property.

item.title: Teen charged after 16-year-old boy allegedly stabbed outside cinema at Maribyrnong shopping centre
item.description: Police allege a group fled on foot after the chaotic fight left three teens injured.

item.title: Woman in her 50s hospitalised after being found with ‘facial injuries’ on Homebush street in Sydney’s west
item.description: The woman told police she was injured elsewhere before travelling to seek help.

item.title: Irrwanyere man Thomas Cowell laid to rest after his remains were held in Australian museum care for six decades
item.description: Flooding unearthed the cattle driver’s grave in the 1960s, sparking a decades-long journey home.

item.title: Spanish tennis star Rafael Jodar defends himself as incident with ballgirl at French Open goes viral
item.description: The insults are coming thick and fast but the player is passionately defending himself.

item.title: Retiring cop alleged target of man driving ute at police and crashing into Mudgee Police Station
item.description: The driver has been denied bail after literally crashing a 40-year veteran officer's retirement party.

item.title: Diesel boost on the water for bottlenecked Queensland regions
item.description: Regional servos are expected to receive extra fuel as authorities scramble to ease mounting pressure on supplies.

item.title: NSW woman charged after alleged child exploitation images uncovered at Canberra photo-printing store
item.description: Staff allegedly discovered the files after a printer error stopped the images from printing.
